top_signals.title: B2C2 and Solidus Labs Partner to Bolster Institutional-Grade Crypto-Native Market Integrity
top_signals.summary: B2C2, a leading global digital asset market maker, today announced a partnership with Solidus Labs, the gold standard for crypto-native trade surveillance. Under the collaboration, B2C2 will deploy Solidus Labs’ HALO platform to provide multidimensional Trade Surveillance across its global operations, including the UK, USA, France, Luxembourg, Singapore and the Cayman Islands. As the digital [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Binance launches SpaceX pre-IPO perps amid $2 trillion valuation bets
Reeves food tariffs policy will ‘barely touch the sides’ on supermarket prices
top_signals.summary: Food manufacturers and retailers have slammed Rachel Reeves’ cost of living measures, claiming the government’s loosening of food tariffs will do little to help supermarkets to cut prices. The Chancellor urged supermarkets to pass on savings from the stripped tariffs to shoppers “in full,” but retailers fear this measure will “barely touch the sides,” City [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
